predicates.name: is_surviving_spouse_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving spouse of the second person (the deceased). This is a background status that may be directly asserted in a case.

predicates.name: is_heir_of
predicates.description: The first person is an heir of the second person (the deceased).

predicates.name: served_as_main_residence_at_opening_of_estate
predicates.description: The property served as the main family residence at the time the estate of the deceased opened.

predicates.name: is_rented_property
predicates.description: The property is subject to a lease (huur).

predicates.name: acquires_right_to_lease
predicates.description: The surviving spouse acquires the exclusive right to the lease of the property, to the exclusion of all other heirs.

predicates.name: excluded_from_lease_right
predicates.description: The heir is excluded from the right to the lease of the property because the surviving spouse holds that right exclusively.
